div1.entryFree:
Mightiness, 1) high power, greatness: let us fear the native m. and fate of him, H5 II, 4, 64. how soon this m. meets misery, H5 II, 4, 64.
2) Used as a title of dignity: will't please your m. to wash your hands? Shr. Ind. 2, 78. your m. on both parts best can witness, H5 V, 2, 28. braves your m. Tit. II, 3, 126.
